Bank of Canada Tracker

Tracking the indicators behind Bank of Canada policy decisions

Last updated: May 07, 2026 at 05:23 UTC

All charts —
Core Inflation Measures — Canada (Year-over-year %)
CPI Breadth — Deviation from 1996–2019 Average: Share of Basket Above 3% or Below 1% (pp)
Policy Rates — Bank of Canada Overnight vs Fed Funds (%)
2-Year Government Bond Yields — Canada vs United States (%)
Consumer Price Index — All Items, Canada (2002=100)
Unemployment Rate — Canada, Seasonally Adjusted (%)
About this dashboard — Built by jayzhaomurray using public data from Statistics Canada and the Bank of Canada Valet API. Raw data available as CSV in the GitHub repository.
